current_chart_value: The patient was oriented to person and place only, with fluctuating attention and slowed information processing. Conversation revealed noticeable confusion and impaired comprehension, though she was able to communicate basic needs clearly. Emotional responses were generally appropriate but limited, consistent with reduced insight and cognitive disorganization. Social interaction appeared diminished, as the patient frequently became disengaged or lost focus during conversation.
